name: hcportal_getCategoryDetail2
description: Retrieves activity feed data for the admin portal dashboard. Returns raw typed data columns for one of 10 categories: 0=New Hashers, 1=Event RSVPs, 2=New Events, 3=New Kennels, 4=App Logins, 5=Payments, 6=Portal Access, 7=Errors, 8=HashRuns.Org Traffic, 100=Version Adoption. Each category returns typed columns specific to its data. Uses a time window of @days days (default 7; if 0, uses 60 minutes). HC6 removes the HC5 header metadata rowset entirely — portal is responsible for all presentation. Uses READ UNCOMMITTED isolation.

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: the authenticated user's public hasher ID. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Required. Category to retrieve: 0=New Hashers, 1=Event RSVPs, 2=New Events, 3=New Kennels, 4=App Logins, 5=Payments, 6=Portal Access, 7=Errors, 8=HashRuns.Org Traffic, 100=Version Adoption. NULL returns an error.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days of history to retrieve. Default 7. Special case: if 0, uses 60 minutes instead. Converted to minutes for cutoff date calculation.

parameters.name: hcVersion
parameters.description: Optional. Used only for category 100 (Version Adoption) to filter logins by app version string via LIKE.

parameters.name: hcBuild
parameters.description: Optional. Used only for category 100 (Version Adoption) to filter logins by app build string via LIKE.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

rowsets.name: CategoryData
rowsets.description: Single rowset returned on success. Column shape varies by categoryId. All queries use OPTION(RECOMPILE) and NOLOCK hints. Note: HC5 returned a header metadata rowset (col1-col6 labels) before the data rowset — that rowset has been removed in HC6. Category-specific schemas follow.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: When the hasher account was created

columns.name: homeKennelName
columns.description: Home kennel name, or NULL if no home kennel

columns.name: cityFullName
columns.description: Nearest city name (from spatial lookup). NULL if HomeLatitude is 51.503300000 (default) or no city found.

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: When the HasherEventMap record was last updated

columns.name: kennelName
columns.description: Name of the kennel for the event

columns.name: displayName
columns.description: Hasher's display name (h.DisplayName if VirginVisitorType=0, else hem.DisplayName)

columns.name: totalRunsThisKennel
columns.description: Total runs at this kennel. COALESCE to 0 if NULL.

columns.name: totalHaringThisKennel
columns.description: Total haring runs at this kennel. COALESCE to 0 if NULL.

columns.name: kennelName
columns.description: Name of the kennel hosting the event

columns.name: cityFullName
columns.description: City name: COALESCE(CityFullName, cityCountryName, cityName) from HC.City

columns.name: displayName
columns.description: Hasher's display name (LEFT JOIN, may be NULL for unknown users)

columns.name: cityFullName
columns.description: City name from HC.City (LEFT JOIN on CityId)

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: When the payment was created from HC.Payment.createdAt

columns.name: displayName
columns.description: Hasher's display name (h1.DisplayName if VirginVisitorType=0, else hem.DisplayName)

columns.name: processedByDisplayName
columns.description: Display name of the user who processed the payment (from HC.Hasher via PaymentProcessedBy_userId)

columns.name: cancelledByDisplayName
columns.description: Display name of the user who cancelled the payment (LEFT JOIN via CancelledBy_UserId). NULL if not cancelled.

columns.name: doPayForExtras
columns.description: Whether to pay for extras from HC.Payment.DoPayForExtras

columns.name: kennelName
columns.description: Home kennel name (LEFT JOIN). NULL if no home kennel.

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: When the error was last updated from HC.ErrorLog.updatedAt

columns.name: displayName
columns.description: Hasher's display name (LEFT JOIN on userId). NULL if no matching hasher.

columns.name: city
columns.description: City extracted via JSON_VALUE(data, '$.city') from LOG.GeneralLog.Data

columns.name: region
columns.description: Region extracted via JSON_VALUE(data, '$.region') from LOG.GeneralLog.Data

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country extracted via JSON_VALUE(data, '$.country') from LOG.GeneralLog.Data

columns.name: kennelName
columns.description: Kennel name (LEFT JOIN via Event.KennelId). NULL if no matching event or kennel.

columns.name: eventName
columns.description: Event name from HC.Event (LEFT JOIN via PublicEventId = StrParam1). NULL if no matching event.

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Most recent login date for this user in the time window (MAX of LoginDate)

columns.name: hcVersion
columns.description: HC app version string from HC.LaunchAndLogin.HcVersion

columns.name: twoWeekCount
columns.description: Number of logins by this user in the time window

columns.name: thisVersionCount
columns.description: Number of logins by this user on the specified @hcVersion + @hcBuild in the time window

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
Never change the meaning of categoryId values (0-8, 100)
Never change the column shape of any category without updating all portal callers
Never restore the HC5 header metadata rowset (col1-col6) — callers have been updated to expect raw typed columns
